title: Hapalochilus chrysoglossus
taxonomy: Hapalochilus chrysoglossus is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and belongs to the genus Hapalochilus. The genus Hapalochilus is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "African waterworts". This classification places it within the monocot family Commelinaceae, which includes other plants such as dayflowers and spiderworts.
